name: Rock Dwarf
description:
Your ancestors lived and worked among the ancient stones of the mountains or the depths of the earth. This makes you solid as a rock when you plant your feet. You gain a +2 circumstance bonus to your Fortitude or Reflex DC against attempts to , , or you. This bonus also applies to saving throws against spells or effects that attempt to force you to move or knock you .

In addition, if any effect would force you to move 10 feet or more, you are moved only half the distance.
